query: SELECT bl.id, bl.bl_number, bl.vehicle_description, bl.container_number, bl.status, bl.customer_id, bl.vehicle_id, v.vin, v.make, v.model FROM bills_of_lading bl LEFT JOIN vehicles v ON bl.vehicle_id = v.id WHERE bl.deleted_at IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3VZFt7SKQu8xeVW.035f96cf6ffd --database mdqtoTdxUgyafXfA49s4Hx --execute SELECT bl.id, bl.bl_number, bl.vehicle_description, bl.container_number, bl.status, bl.customer_id, bl.vehicle_id, v.vin, v.make, v.model FROM bills_of_lading bl LEFT JOIN vehicles v ON bl.vehicle_id = v.id WHERE bl.deleted_at IS NULL;
